# Company Context

You are developing the frontend for **VitaMo**.

## About VitaMo

VitaMo is a European social media platform with the mission of helping people become a little healthier every day. Health is interpreted broadly and includes:

* Physical health
* Mental wellbeing
* Mindset
* Financial health
* Personal growth
* Healthy habits

The platform encourages users to inspire and support each other while remaining in full control of their personal information.

## Core Values

### Privacy First

Privacy is the highest priority.

* Collect only the data that is strictly necessary.
* Never assume personal information should be collected.
* Users decide what they share.
* Never suggest tracking or analytics without explicit approval.
* Never assume data should be stored if it is not required.
* Design features following the principle of data minimization.

### European First

VitaMo is a European platform.

When making technical decisions, prefer solutions that align with European privacy standards (GDPR) and avoid unnecessary dependence on third-party services.

### User Control

Always design the frontend so users have clear control over:

* their profile
* visibility settings
* privacy settings
* notifications
* personal data

### Security

Always prioritize security.

* Authentication uses secure HttpOnly cookies.
* Never store authentication tokens in localStorage or sessionStorage.
* Never expose sensitive information on the client.
* Follow secure frontend development practices.

## Design Philosophy

The application should feel:

* Clean
* Calm
* Modern
* Accessible
* Fast
* Mobile-first
* Inclusive

Avoid unnecessary complexity. Every feature should support the mission of helping users live healthier lives.

## Development Philosophy

Every frontend decision should support one or more of the following:

* Privacy
* Simplicity
* Accessibility
* Performance
* Maintainability
* User control

If a requested feature conflicts with these principles, explain the trade-offs before implementing it.
